attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY         AS   OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,  
 NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS   OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE        AS   OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, 
 -999 AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
 'Engine' AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
  NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT     AS   END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
 'MANUAL' AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
  COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY  ,-999) AS    FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
 'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
 'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,              
 'UNKNOWN'  AS NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  
 '=' AS  OWNED_FLG,                     
 COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)    AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
 -999  AS SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
 -999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
 'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
 'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
 CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE    
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRHMT_RBK_MNL_TRX NEMT
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT MANUAL_TRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRHMT_RBK_MNL_TRX WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_MNL_TRX
 ON SLCTD_MNL_TRX.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
 AND NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
 ON NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM 
 ON NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
 AND NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   =NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM
 ON NOBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY=NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
 AND NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
 AND NOBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE=NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
 WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('POS_ADJ','SLS_ADJ')  
 AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) >0
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM  ( SELECT NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT,NSAL.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE NSAL
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT1
ON NEMT1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY and NSAL.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
AND COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) >0
)NSAL1
WHERE NBM.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = NSAL1.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
AND NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY   =NSAL1.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT)

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,  
'Engine' AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,
 100 AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NESL.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,  
'UNKNOWN' AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD        ,  
'GEO_ACCOUNT' AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE
    
 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRICHMENT_SO_LINE NESL
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRICHMENT_SO_LINE WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_SOL
 ON SLCTD_SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NESL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM
 ON NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NESL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('ERP','AR')
 AND COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_FOR_SO_LN_TV NESL1
WHERE NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NESL1.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NESL1.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NESL1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NESL1.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,  
'Engine' AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD, 
 100 AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEPT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,             
'UNKNOWN' AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEPT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD ,  
'GEO_ACCOUNT' AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_POS_TRX_LN NEPT
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_POS_TRX_LN WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_POS
 ON SLCTD_POS.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=NEPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM
 ON NOBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NEPT.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
 WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='POS'
 AND COALESCE(NEPT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN_TV NEPT1
WHERE NOBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = NEPT1.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND NEPT1.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND NOBM.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT>0 
AND COALESCE(NEPT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NEPT1.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
'Engine' AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD, 
 100 AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,   
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NEAR.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,            
 'UNKNOWN'  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NEAR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD ,  
'GEO_ACCOUNT' AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE  
 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_NAPPLD_TRX NEAR    
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT AR_TRX_LINE_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_NAPPLD_TRX WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_NAPLD
 ON SLCTD_NAPLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=NEAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM
 ON NOBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NEAR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
 WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ='AR'
 AND NOBM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY < 0 AND COALESCE(NEAR.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CUST_NAPLD_TRX_TV NEAR1
WHERE NOBM.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NEAR1.AR_TRANSACTION_LINE_KEY
AND NEAR1.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NEAR1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NEAR1.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'   )

SELECT
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,
NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE ,
NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
-999 AS   BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,      
'Engine' AS   ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,
NESL.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT  as  END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
'MANUAL' AS  ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
COALESCE(NESL.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PTY_KEY  ,-999) AS   FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,           
CASE WHEN COALESCE(NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,-999)>0 THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE NULL END  AS   NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  -- CONFIRM : FOR DEFAULT RECORDS ITS NULL  
'='    AS   OWNED_FLG,                     
COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY      ,-999) AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
-999  AS  SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
-999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
'GEO_ACCOUNT' AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE 
 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ES_ITM_SLS_TRX  NESL
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
             FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ES_ITM_SLS_TRX  
             WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> /* (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE 
       FROM $$ETLVWDB.DW_JOB_STREAMS 
       WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID='wf_N_GEO_ACCT_ES_ITM_SLS_TRX') */  /*it is 1900-01-01 in production. Shall we update this or shall we write another update*/
	   (SELECT LAST_EXTRACT_DATE FROM $$ETLVWDB.CTL_ETL_LAST_EXTRACT_DATES WHERE JOB_STREAM_ID = 'wf_WI_MT_GEO_ACNT_OVRLY_MSR_VEC' AND TABLE_NAME='N_GEO_ACCT_ES_ITM_SLS_TRX')
    GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_SOL
 ON SLCTD_SOL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM
 ON NOBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NESL.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
  WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('XAAS')
AND NOBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY >0  AND COALESCE(NESL.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_FLVDT_ENDCST_SS_ITMSLSTRX_TV NESL1
WHERE NOBM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NESL1.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND NESL1.ENRCHMT_SLS_ACCT_PTY_TYPE_CD   = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
AND COALESCE(NESL1.SALES_ACCT_GROUP_PTY_KEY,-999)>0
AND NESL1.END_TV_DT ='3500-01-01'   )

SELECT
 NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY         AS   OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,  
 NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS   OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
 NOBM.OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE        AS   OVERLAY_BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE, 
 -999 AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,        
 'Engine' AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,   
  NEMT.END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT     AS   END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,  
 'MANUAL' AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,   
  COALESCE(NEMT.FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY  ,-999) AS    FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY, 
 'UNKNOWN'   AS   HQ_REMOTE_CD,                 
 'UNKNOWN'   AS   LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,     
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0) AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,              
 'UNKNOWN'  AS NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,  
 '=' AS  OWNED_FLG,                     
 COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)    AS   SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY, 
 -999  AS SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT, 
 -999 AS  SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY, 
 'UNKNOWN'  AS   VALIDATION_MODE_CD,            
 'UNKNOWN'   AS   VALIDATION_STATUS_CD  ,
 CAST('GEO_ACCOUNT' AS VARCHAR(20)) AS ENRCHMT_ACCT_TYPE    
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRHMT_RBK_MNL_TRX NEMT
 INNER JOIN ( SELECT MANUAL_TRX_KEY FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_GEO_ACCT_ENRHMT_RBK_MNL_TRX WHERE EDW_UPDATE_DTM> '$$LastExtractDate' GROUP BY 1) SLCTD_MNL_TRX
 ON SLCTD_MNL_TRX.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
 AND NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY <>-999
 INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_OVERLAY_BKGS_MEASURE NOBM
 ON NOBM.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY
 WHERE NOBM.OVRLY_BKGS_MSR_TRANS_TYPE_CODE IN ('O_ADJ','M_ADJ') 
 AND COALESCE(NEMT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
 AND NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_VLDTD_END_CST_RBK_MNL_TRX_TV NEMT1
 WHERE NEMT1.MANUAL_TRX_KEY=NEMT.MANUAL_TRX_KEY 
 AND NEMT1.ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD = 'NAMED_ACCOUNT'
 AND COALESCE(NEMT1.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,-999)>0
 AND NEMT1.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00')
